hero.title.part2: Learn to code your vision with
hero.subtitle: A practical 12-week course, in boutique groups of up to 5 participants. From basic Python coding to creating complex AI apps, independent interfaces, text, audio, video, and spectacular images.
hero.cta.primary: For details and matching – Let's talk on WhatsApp
features.title: Why learn to build it yourself?
features.card1.title: Freedom from existing tools
features.card1.desc: End users are limited to interfaces other companies built (Wrappers). Here you'll learn the architecture behind the scenes and build your own dedicated AI tools.
features.card2.title: Code as a creative tool
features.card2.desc: Python is not just a programming language, it's your new brush. You will learn coding at a basic and practical level to connect APIs and breathe life into complex ideas.
features.card3.title: Ultimate control of your product
features.card3.desc: From realistic text & audio generation to custom models (LoRA) and video. Get the architectural foundation to create your own innovative projects.
syllabus.title: Syllabus - From Foundation to Canvas
syllabus.part1.title: Introduction to Python
syllabus.part1.desc: Variables, data types, loops, functions, file handling, and API connections (Requests).
syllabus.part2.title: Working with OpenAI API
syllabus.part2.desc: Text generation, image generation, speech-to-text (Whisper), text-to-speech (TTS), vision capabilities, chaining requests, and structured outputs.
syllabus.part3.title: Prompt Engineering (Claude & Perplexity)
syllabus.part3.tag: The Art of communicating with machines
syllabus.part3.desc: Advanced prompt engineering principles, parsing complex documents (PDFs), transcription, and real-time streaming data.
syllabus.part4.title: Creative generation with Flux, LoRA & Video
syllabus.part4.desc: Working with Flux model for high-end image generation, Fine-Tuning using LoRAs, and advanced video generation techniques.
syllabus.part5.title: AI Coding Tools & Building Interfaces
syllabus.part5.desc: Using GitHub Copilot and Cline for rapid coding. Building interactive UIs and chatbots easily with the Gradio environment.
syllabus.part6.title: Final Project
syllabus.part6.desc: Building a full Generative AI solution, from scratch to a working interface, integrating all tools learned in the course.
prerequisites.title: What do you need to start?
prerequisites.item3: Accounts and API keys for OpenAI, Claude, and Perplexity.
prerequisites.item4: A laptop and a curiosity to create.
footer.title: Let's check if it's right for you
footer.desc: To maintain personal attention and practical learning, our groups are limited to 5 participants. There is no automated registration form here - I want to hear about your background and ensure the course will give you maximum value.
footer.cta.whatsapp: Send me a message on WhatsApp
footer.copyright: Built with code and a lot of AI © 2026 Eyal Rabinovich
